---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the governance template, docs, or skills
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What usage gap or friction are you trying to solve?

## Proposed improvement

Describe the change you want.

## Why this belongs in the template

Explain why this is reusable across projects rather than specific to one repo.

## Affected areas

- [ ] README / onboarding
- [ ] AGENTS / CLAUDE entry
- [ ] requirements templates
- [ ] reports
- [ ] context
- [ ] skills
- [ ] other

## Additional context

Links, examples, or screenshots if relevant.
